name_cn:
Small Caramel
Brand new FEND1 First is here!!
Designed by Kim Jones, the first FEND1, subverting the previous bag shape, metal trim large Logo lock plus body design combines architectural deconstruction with fashion, elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Handheld for evening parties is full of aura, crossbody also has a high-end street chic feel!
Large 127 Dimensions 32.5x15x23.5cm
Small 129 Dimensions 26x9.5x18
